is it worth it?

Short take: worth considering. iPhone 15 Pro at $800 in Like new condition with battery at 99% looks like a 89/100 deal. I would start around $740. Watch out for risk flags: battery health not provided. Before paying, verify IMEI/iCloud lock, Face ID, cameras, battery health in Settings, and meet in a public place.
